nasb.text: Every male among the sons of Aaron may eat it; it is a permanent ordinance throughout your generations, from the offerings by fire to the Lord. Whoever touches them will become consecrated.’ ”

esv.text: Every male among the children of Aaron may eat of it, as decreed forever throughout your generations, from the Lord’s food offerings. Whatever touches them shall become holy.”

cnv.text: 亞倫的子孫中的男丁，都要從獻給耶和華的火祭中吃這些祭物；這是你們世世代代永遠的律例。人接觸過這些祭物，必成為聖。”

ccb.text: 亚伦的子孙中，男子都可以吃。这是他们世世代代应得之份。凡接触到这些祭物的都会变得圣洁。”
